---
id: exchange-rate-business-controller-get-crypto-rates
title: "Get exchange rates for a specific crypto asset"
description: "Returns exchange rates for a specific crypto asset (e.g., BTC, ETH, USDT) to all fiat currencies, including supported networks."
sidebar_label: "Get exchange rates for a specific crypto asset"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/appreal-api-business
custom_edit_url: null
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get exchange rates for a specific crypto asset"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/exchange-rates/{asset}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns exchange rates for a specific crypto asset (e.g., BTC, ETH, USDT) to all fiat currencies, including supported networks.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
